scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @builderbot/config && npm run build --workspace @builderbot/domain && npm run build --workspace @builderbot/ui && npm run build --workspace @builderbot/api && npm run build --workspace @builderbot/worker && npm run build --workspace @builderbot/admin
scripts.dev: npm run build --workspace @builderbot/config && npm run build --workspace @builderbot/domain && npm run dev --workspace @builderbot/api
scripts.dev:admin: npm run build --workspace @builderbot/ui && npm run dev --workspace @builderbot/admin
scripts.dev:worker: npm run build --workspace @builderbot/config && npm run dev --workspace @builderbot/worker
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace @builderbot/domain && npm run build --workspace @builderbot/config && npm run build --workspace @builderbot/domain && npm run test --workspace @builderbot/api
